candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; useful as fallback across years.
This is COGS, not revenue.
This is COGS total, not revenue.
Operating expense, not revenue.
Non-operating financial income, not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Use Revenue as primary and Total Revenue as fallback since both represent the same top-line concept and labels may vary by year.

candidates.why: Direct COGS/cost of sales label.
Total cost of revenues; appears to align with broader COGS coverage and is populated in 2025 when Cost of Revenues is blank.

variables.notes: Priority list: prefer the more complete total cost-of-revenues line, then the direct Cost of Revenues line as fallback.

candidates.why: Potential SG&A component, but label appears in multiple sections including production and sales/admin, so ambiguous as a standalone final mapping.
Explicit SG&A-style overhead row and populated; per rule hierarchy, select only this explicit SG&A row.
Also an explicit SG&A row, but appears more limited and likely a subcomponent/subperiod variant than the broader Sales and administration costs row.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: An explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so select only that row. Excluded Personnel Costs due to duplication/ambiguity across production and SG&A sections; excluded Selling, General & Administrative Expenses because the broader explicit overhead row is preferable.

candidates.why: Inventory/development asset balance sheet item, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Tenant-owner association fats of own development under production
candidates.why: Work-in-progress/inventory-type balance sheet item, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No clear R&D expense row is present on the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet. Candidate rows are balance sheet development assets, not period R&D expense.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense line under financial costs; preferred for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the companys shareholders
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line; excludes minority interest and therefore avoids double counting with MIB.
Includes minority interest; only fallback if no parent-only equity line existed.
Balancing/subtotal placeholder, not preferred.
Balancing/subtotal placeholder, not preferred.
Full balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the companys shareholders

variables.notes: Prefer parent/shareholder equity to exclude non-controlling interests. Total Equity included only as fallback if the parent-only label is unavailable in some periods.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of earnings to minority interest, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet minority/non-controlling interest line.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not minority interest itself.

variables.notes: Use the balance sheet Minority Interest line as non-controlling interest. This pairs correctly with BE based on parent-only equity.
